mapper.select: SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, lot.lot_code, emp.ename, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
SELECT item_num, code, name FROM item

SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, lot.lot_code, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num
AND io.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND io.io_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND qc.qc_pass = #{type}
AND ( upper(item.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(item.code) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
ORDER BY io.io_date DESC

SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, lot.lot_num, lot.lot_code, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num WHERE io.qc_chked = 'N' ORDER BY io.io_date DESC

SELECT io.io_num, io.io_qty, io.io_date, emp.ename, lot.lot_num, lot.lot_code, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.code, item.name, item.unit FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num WHERE io.io_num = #{io_num} ORDER BY io.io_date DESC

SELECT io.io_num, lot.lot_code, item.name, io.io_qty, item.unit, io.io_date, qc.qc_pass, emp.ename FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num WHERE lot.lot_num = ( SELECT lot_num FROM io WHERE io_num = #{io_num} ) ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
SELECT qc_pass from qc WHERE qc_num = #{qc_num}
SELECT io_qty from io where io_num = ${io_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO io ( io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num, qc_chked ) VALUES ( io_seq.NEXTVAL, '출고', #{io_qty}, sysdate, 0, #{lot_num}, '품질검사', 7, #{emp_num}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO io ( io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num, qc_chked ) VALUES ( io_seq.NEXTVAL, '입고', #{io_qty}, sysdate, #{qc_num}, #{lot_num}, '검사완료',
4, #{emp_num}, 'Y' )
INSERT INTO defective ( defect_num , defect_reason , defect_action , defect_qty , io_num ) VALUES ( defect_seq.NEXTVAL, '오염', '폐기', #{defect_qty}, #{io_num} )
